SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-29-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-29-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT MERLINDA RIEMEDIO. DEFENDANT VICTORIA'S SECRET IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MALLORY MCCARTHY, BRAND OPERATIONS. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIEMEDIO, MERLINDA AS TO DEFENDANT VICTORIA'S SECRET
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RIEMEDIO, MERLINDA AS TO DEFENDANT VICTORIA'S SECRET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/05/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED - RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIEMEDIO, MERLINDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VICTORIA'S SECRET THE PLAINTIFF IN A CASE ALLEGING THAT A CONSUMER PRODUCT WAS DEFECTIVE OR CAUSED HARM MUST COME FORWARD WITH SOME EVIDENCE THAT THERE IS A PROBLEM WITH THE PRODUCT. HERE THERE IS NO EVIDENCE OF A PROBLEM WITH THE PRODUCT AND PLAINTIFF'S ASSERTIONS THAT IT IS DEFECTIVE ARE NOT ENOUGH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-10-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VICTORIA'S SECRET
DECLARATION RE: UPDATE OF MAILING ADDRESS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT VICTORIA'S SECRET
